analysis: The current project has a black hole theme with dark cosmic visuals, animations, and interactive elements. The event.json specifies the topic as black holes with bulk animated objects, slides, and pages. The existing improvements focus on completing the theme and fixing syntax errors. The theme needs to be enhanced with more immersive black hole visuals, smoother animations, and interactive elements that align with the black hole topic.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with advanced black hole animations, including swirling effects, gravitational lensing, and glowing accretion disks. Add CSS variables for a cohesive cosmic color palette and ensure all animations are smooth and visually appealing.

Add more interactive sections related to black holes, such as a timeline of black hole discoveries, a quiz about black holes, and a 3D model of a black hole. Ensure the HTML is structured to support these new sections.

Implement advanced JavaScript functionality for the new sections, including smooth scrolling for the timeline, interactive quiz logic, and 3D model controls. Fix any remaining syntax errors and ensure all event handlers are properly implemented.
